ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for project completion */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Overall status of the project (e.g., active, on hold, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for task completion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the task */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., admin, project manager, team member) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "achieved_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., achieved, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the milestone (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the budget is for */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Total amount allocated for the project */,
  "spent_amount" REAL /* Amount already spent from the budget */,
  "remaining_amount" REAL /* Amount remaining in the budget */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., initial, revised) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., task assignment, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, project manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the time entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the time */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Hours spent on the task */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the time was logged */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the time entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the time entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update relates to */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status, budget) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was recorded */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., project update, budget change) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the tag is related to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)
